name: elevenlabs_design_voice
description: Design a brand-new synthetic voice from a text description using ElevenLabs Voice Design (text-to-voice). Two steps: (1) call with just a voice_description to generate 3 candidate preview voices; (2) call again with the chosen generated_voice_id AND a name to save it as a real voice in the BlackBox voice selector. Use when the user wants to invent a voice from a description (e.g. 'a gravelly old wizard') rather than clone a real recording.

voice_description.description: Describe the voice to design (e.g. 'a warm middle-aged British female narrator'). Required for the preview step; reused as the saved voice's description.

text.description: Optional sample text the previews speak (100-1000 chars). Omit to let ElevenLabs auto-generate the sample text.

generated_voice_id.description: Step 2 only: the generated_voice_id of the preview the user picked (from the step-1 results).

name.description: Step 2 only: the display name to save the chosen preview under.

returns: Step 1: 3 preview voices (each with a generated_voice_id + audio_url). Step 2: the saved voice's id (elevenlabs:<id>).
example: elevenlabs_design_voice(voice_description="a gravelly old wizard") then elevenlabs_design_voice(voice_description="a gravelly old wizard", generated_voice_id="<id>", name="Gandalf")
notes: Two-step flow: preview first, then save the chosen generated_voice_id with a name. Providing a generated_voice_id without a name returns an error asking for the name.
